focus_points.label: Energy levels since joining
focus_points.reason: Notes mention a change in energy since Tom joined. Could be fatigue, disengagement, or something personal — worth exploring how he's feeling overall.

focus_points.label: Connection with the team lately
focus_points.reason: Tom missed the last two socials and there are hints of friction with a teammate. This could indicate a shift in team dynamics or personal connections — worth discussing.

focus_points.label: Workload and pace of work
focus_points.reason: PR reviews are slower and commits have thinned out. This could be a sign of overload, lack of clarity, or motivation issues — important to clarify what's affecting his pace.

focus_points.label: Feedback on design-system PR
focus_points.reason: There was friction on a recent PR that got heavily reworked. Understanding his perspective on the feedback received could reveal insights into his current state.

focus_points.label: Feeling recognized for contributions
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — common concern for juniors; worth checking if Tom feels his work is acknowledged or if he has any wins he wants to share.
